description_long: This doll features a large, spherical head with a wood-textured circular faceplate and a metallic, brushed surface covering the rest of the head. The body is short and rounded, with arms and legs that are proportionally smaller than the head. The torso and limbs are decorated with intricate, dark line art resembling tattoos or graffiti, and there are visible patches of red and gray shading across the body. The doll stands on a hexagonal, stone-textured base, giving it a sturdy appearance. The overall aesthetic combines urban street art influences with a slightly industrial, weathered look.
description: A large-headed doll with a wood-textured faceplate, metallic head, tattoo-like body art, and a stone-textured hexagonal base.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wood-textured faceplate, tattooed body, and the hexagonal base.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the spherical metallic head and tattooed arm, with the base visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the smooth metallic back of the head, tattooed back, and both legs.
description_view_3: Right side view reveals more tattoo details on the arm and side of the body, with the head's texture visible.
attribute_clothing_style: The doll appears unclothed but is decorated with intricate, tattoo-like line art and graffiti-inspired patterns in black and red, giving it an urban street art aesthetic.
attribute_pose: The doll stands upright with both arms relaxed at its sides and legs slightly apart, head facing forward in a neutral, static pose.
attribute_facial_expression: No facial features or expression are visible; the face is a blank, wood-textured circular plate.
attribute_hair_style: No visible hair; the head is a smooth, metallic sphere.
